records.ety: [L. vernalis, fr. vernus vernal, ver spring; akin to Gr. 'e`ar, Skr. vasanta, Icel. vār, and E. Easter, east.]

defs: Of or pertaining to the spring; appearing in the spring; as, vernal bloom.
quotes: And purple all the ground with vernal flowers.

defs: Fig.: Belonging to youth, the spring of life.
quotes: When after the long vernal day of life.
And seems it hard thy vernal years Few vernal joys can show?
